description_long: This object is a handheld chainsaw with a long, serrated cutting bar and a robust, rectangular motor housing. The cutting bar features a visible chain with evenly spaced teeth, designed for efficient wood cutting. The housing is primarily a dark reddish-brown color, with metallic and black accents, and includes a cylindrical handle at the rear for grip and control. A secondary, smaller handle or guard is visible near the base of the bar, likely for added stability during operation. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical details and a rugged, industrial finish. No visible brand markings or power source indicators are present on the exterior.
description: A rugged, handheld chainsaw with a long serrated bar, dark reddish-brown housing, and metallic accents. Features a prominent rear handle and visible cutting chain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular motor housing and the cylindrical rear handle aligned with the cutting bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the serrated cutting bar and the chain, with the handle and guard visible at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the back of the housing, with the bar extending away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bar, chain, and the secondary handle or guard near the base.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a cylindrical rear handle and a smaller front handle or guard near the base of the bar, both designed for grip and control.
